---
title: "hgp_fit"
generated: true
description: "Fit a mass-univariate hierarchical Gaussian process."
---

[‚Äπ back to `nitrix.stats.hgp`](../nitrix-stats-hgp.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:hgp_fit -->
```python
hgp_fit(Y: Float[Array, 'V N'], x: Float[Array, ' N'], group: Int[Array, ' N'], *, group_inner: Optional[Int[Array, ' N']] = None, parametric: Optional[Float[Array, 'N q']] = None, kernel: str = 'matern52', rank: int = 12, model: str = 'GS', boundary: float = 1.5, bounds: Optional[Tuple[float, float]] = None, rho_bounds: Optional[Tuple[float, float]] = None, n_rho: int = 24, map_rho: Optional[Callable[[Float[Array, '']], Float[Array, '']]] = None, n_levels: Optional[int] = None, n_levels_inner: Optional[int] = None, n_outer: int = 30, n_search: int = 15, ridge: float = 1e-08, lam_floor: float = 1e-06, lam_ceil: float = 100000000.0, block: Optional[int] = None) -> HGPResult
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:hgp_fit -->
Fit a mass-univariate hierarchical Gaussian process.

Fits, per element, a population smooth of the covariate `x` plus
group-level smooth deviations that share a kernel -- the "GS" hierarchical
GAM, using the reduced-rank Hilbert-space (HSGP) engine. The shared
lengthscale is profiled over a pooled-REML grid and each variance component's
smoothing parameter is fitted by the generalised Fellner-Schall step.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:hgp_fit -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `Y` | `Float` | `V` √ó `N` | ‚Äî | `(V, N)` responses (one row per element). |
| `x` | `Float` | `N` | ‚Äî | `(N,)` covariate the GP smooths *over* (a single covariate, **not** the full design matrix; linear covariates go to `parametric`). |
| `group` | `Int` | `N` | ‚Äî | `(N,)` integer factor labels $0 \ldots L-1$ (the grouping the smooth varies over -- subjects, sites, ...). For `model='nested'` this is the **outer** factor. |
| `group_inner` | `Optional[Int[Array, ' N']]` | ‚Äî | `None` | `(N,)` integer labels of the **inner** factor (nested within `group`), $0 \ldots L_2-1$ globally. Required for `model='nested'`. |
| `parametric` | `Optional[Float[Array, 'N q']]` | ‚Äî | `None` | Optional `(N, q)` unpenalised linear design (with the intercept). |
| `kernel` | `str` | ‚Äî | `'matern52'` | Covariance kernel name (as `nitrix.stats.gp.gp_fit`); enters only through the diagonal spectral reweighting. |
| `rank` | `int` | ‚Äî | `12` | Per-smooth eigenfunction count $m$ (default `12` -- the design is $1 + L$ smooths wide, so a smaller rank than `gp_fit` is usual). |
| `model` | `str` | ‚Äî | `'GS'` | Hierarchical structure. `'GS'` (default): a global smoother plus group-level smoothers with one shared group wiggliness $\sigma_{\mathrm{grp}}^2$. `'nested'`: a two-level hierarchy (outer `g1` / inner `g2`) -- population + outer-group + inner-group (nested) GP deviations, three variance components ($\sigma_{\mathrm{pop}}^2$, $\sigma_{\mathrm{outer}}^2$, $\sigma_{\mathrm{inner}}^2$) sharing $\rho$. |
| `boundary` | `float` | ‚Äî | `1.5` | HSGP domain-extension factor (as `nitrix.stats.gp.gp_fit`); must be `>= 1.0`. |
| `bounds` | `Optional[Tuple[float, float]]` | ‚Äî | `None` | Optional `(lo, hi)` covariate domain; defaults to the range of `x`. |
| `rho_bounds` | `Optional[Tuple[float, float]]` | ‚Äî | `None` | Optional `(lo, hi)` bounds of the shared-lengthscale search; defaults to a span-relative range. |
| `n_rho` | `int` | ‚Äî | `24` | Number of grid points in the shared-lengthscale search. |
| `map_rho` | `Optional[Callable[[Float[Array, '']], Float[Array, '']]]` | ‚Äî | `None` | Optional lengthscale prior $\rho \mapsto -\log p(\rho)$ added to the pooled objective (e.g. a builder from `nitrix.stats.priors`). |
| `n_levels` | `Optional[int]` | ‚Äî | `None` | Outer / inner factor-level counts (default to `max + 1`); pass when a level is absent so the block widths are stable. |
| `n_levels_inner` | `Optional[int]` | ‚Äî | `None` | Outer / inner factor-level counts (default to `max + 1`); pass when a level is absent so the block widths are stable. |
| `n_outer` | `int` | ‚Äî | `30` | Number of Fellner-Schall iterations for the final per-element fit. |
| `n_search` | `int` | ‚Äî | `15` | Number of Fellner-Schall iterations during the lengthscale search. |
| `ridge` | `float` | ‚Äî | `1e-08` | Ridge added to the penalised Gram matrix for numerical stability. |
| `lam_floor` | `float` | ‚Äî | `1e-06` | Lower and upper clamps on each smoothing parameter. |
| `lam_ceil` | `float` | ‚Äî | `100000000.0` | Lower and upper clamps on each smoothing parameter. |
| `block` | `Optional[int]` | ‚Äî | `None` | Optional element-block size for the chunked `vmap` reduction (bounds peak memory on brain-scale $V$). |

**Returns** `HGPResult`. Per-element fit with coefficients, the log-variance parameters `theta` (per-component GP variances, residual variance and shared lengthscale), the REML marginal likelihood, the population / group effective degrees of freedom, and the dispersion.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:hgp_fit -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `V` | elements of a mass-univariate map ‚Äî voxels, vertices, or fixels |
| `N` | observations ‚Äî time points, subjects, or sampled points |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
